fields.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP sequence.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoderFrame` holds the pixel data and display duration for one frame of an
animated WebP image. Construct frames from an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKBitmap>,
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKImage>, or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap>, then pass a span of frames
to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(System.ReadOnlySpan{SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame},SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions)>.

This is a value type and does not require disposal. However, the underlying bitmap,
image, or pixmap used to construct the frame must remain alive until encoding completes.

## Examples

```csharp
using var bitmap1 = new SKBitmap(100, 100);
using var bitmap2 = new SKBitmap(100, 100);
using var canvas1 = new SKCanvas(bitmap1);
using var canvas2 = new SKCanvas(bitmap2);
canvas1.Clear(SKColors.Red);
canvas2.Clear(SKColors.Blue);

var frames = new SKWebpEncoderFrame[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap1, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap2, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)),
};
var data = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default);
if (data is not null)
    File.WriteAllBytes("animated.webp", data.ToArray());
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct with the specified bitmap and duration.

params.bitmap: The bitmap providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The display duration for this frame.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct with the specified image and duration.

params.duration: The display duration for this frame.
params.image: The image providing the pixel data for this frame.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct with the specified pixmap and duration.

params.duration: The display duration for this frame.
params.pixmap: The pixmap providing the pixel data for this frame.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the display duration for this frame.
fields.value: The amount of time this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the pixel data for this frame.
fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing the pixel data for this frame.
